prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科 主榜2026年约第17名，近年排名稳定，属全国顶尖高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与校园安全舆情；抖音热度排名第44位（较热），评价为" 文科生的最高殿堂"；2024年曾出现明显负面事件，但2025年声誉转为中性/混合；整体舆情对报考意愿有轻微抑制；拥有15个A-及以上学科，其中统计学A+、计 算机科学与技术A、物理学A-等与物理类招生专业高度匹配；统计学为全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年热度推荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐（76.86），人工智能谨慎观望（42.49）；本省2026年考生总数110868人，按近年物理类占比约73%估算约80934人，较2025年物理 类80421人略增，竞争压力略有加大；中国人民大学位于北京，对吉林 省考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年计划小幅扩招（+1人）、学校顶尖层次持续吸引高分考生、声誉舆 情偏负面略有抑制、本省物理类考生数略增等因素，在2025年基准390名基础上，结合考生规模增加及专业热度（计算机/电子信息高热）对竞争的双向 影响，预计位次略后移至约408名；区间380–436名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking fluctuated significantly: approximately 451 → 385 → 490 → 470 → 390, with recent three years oscillating between 390 and 490; the baseline for 2025 is about 390th place. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics/Science categories was 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 17, an increase of 1 (+6.25%) compared to 2025's 16, indicating a relatively small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: Institution Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable recent rankings, belonging to the top national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with the evaluation 'the highest temple for liberal arts students.' A notable negative event occurred in 2024, but reputation turned neutral/mixed in 2025. Overall public opinion has a slight dampening effect on application willingness. It has 15 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Statistics, A in Computer Science and Technology, and A- in Physics, which highly match the enrollment majors in the Physics category. Statistics is nationally top-tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science category is recommended as hot in 2024, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended as hot (76.86), Artificial Intelligence is cautiously watched (42.49). The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is 110,868, with an estimated 80,934 in the Physics category based on the recent proportion of about 73%, a slight increase from 80,421 in 2025, indicating slightly increased competition pressure. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which has a strong attraction for Jilin province candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations, a small expansion in the 2026 plan (+1 person), the top-tier institution level continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, slightly negative reputation public opinion having a slight dampening effect, and a slight increase in the number of Physics category examinees in the province, based on the 2025 baseline of 390th place, and taking into account the bidirectional impact of increased candidate numbers and major popularity (Computer/Electronics high heat) on competition, the estimated ranking is expected to shift slightly backward to about 408th place, with a range of 380–436.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 380–436, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 380), one can focus on reaching for top-tier Tier 1 majors such as Statistics and Law. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range, it is advisable to mainly choose stable Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 102 → 104 → 111 → 115, showing a gradual slight backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13 positions in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 115; the provincial history/liberal arts enrollment plan was 23 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 24 in 2024, and 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, unchanged from 2025, with no change in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years (18 in 2021 → 17 in 2025 → 17 in 2026), belonging to the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), evaluated as "the highest hall for liberal arts students"; there was a significant negative incident in 2024 (professor sexual harassment), but the reputation turned neutral/mixed in 2025, with Journalism and Communication receiving an A++ rating; overall public opinion has a slight inhibitory effect on application willingness; has 15 A- and above disciplines, including 9 A+ disciplines: Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Law, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Statistics, Business Administration, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature; Law A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Business Administration A+, etc., highly matching the history category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 saw differentiated and wait-and-see popularity, Finance/Economics differentiated and wait-and-see (65.49), Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged (31.59); the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is 110,868, estimated at about 29,934 based on the recent history category proportion of about 27%, slightly lower than the 2025 history category of 31,071, with slightly eased competition pressure; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which has a strong attraction for Jilin Province examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the top-tier level of the school continuing to attract high-scoring examinees, the slightly negative reputation and public opinion having a slight inhibitory effect, and the slight decrease in the number of provincial history category examinees, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 115; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 118, with a range of 110–126.
